title: Advice Surgeries - Shabana Mahmood
meta_description: Member of Parliament for Birmingham Ladywood
text_excerpt: Advice Surgeries - Shabana Mahmood Skip to main content Shabana Mahmood Member of Parliament for Birmingham Ladywood Tiktok Facebook Donate News In Parliament Advice Centres Contact More Menu Advice Surgeries Advice Centres are held in person and online. 💡 If your case is about housing or immigration, most queries can be dealt with over email. Please email [email protected] as a first point of contact. Shabana runs advice centres in different parts of the constituency, including a virtual surgery. Attendance is now by appointment only. You can book by emailing Shabana’s parliamentary email address on this page. You can talk to a member of Shabana’s team about anything from Housing to Repairs, Universal Credit to Litter and Dumping. Please note that we are not able to provide legal advice. If your issue is urgent please email [email protected] and we will reply as soon as possible. See more on Facebook Shabana Mahmood Contact details Email: [email protected] Further details Promoted by the West Midlands Labour Party on behalf of Shabana Mahmood all at 1Unit 4302, Waterside Centre, B37 7YN. ©2026 Copyright Shabana Mahmood MP all rights reserved.
